description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a slender build, dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve top and matching pants, both of which have a modern, utilitarian style. The individual wears tall boots and gloves, suggesting readiness for urban activity or travel. A medium-sized pouch or satchel is strapped to the right hip, adding a practical accessory for carrying personal items. The person's hair is styled in a series of tight, segmented buns or knots running along the back of the head, giving a distinctive and contemporary appearance. The facial features are neutral, and the overall attire is streamlined, with minimal ornamentation. The outfit and accessories are suitable for everyday movement through city streets or public spaces.
description: A slender adult dressed in a modern, fitted outfit with tall boots, gloves, and a hip pouch, featuring a unique segmented bun hairstyle. The look is practical and contemporary, ideal for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the fitted top, gloves, boots, and the person's facial features, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the segmented bun hairstyle, and the pouch resting on the right hip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the outfit, the full length of the pouch, and the segmented hairstyle running down the head.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the pouch more prominently and the side profile of the face and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve top and pants with tall boots and gloves, accessorized with a hip pouch
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair styled in segmented buns along the back of the head
